message:
fix(store,command,runtime): plug stream metadata leaks on key overwrite and harden INFO/ACL paths

Cleans up stream_groups and stream_last_ids when keys are overwritten via
RENAME, RESTORE, and ZDIFFSTORE. Reports real pubsub channel counts and
memory usage in INFO stats. Switches ACL password comparison to
constant-time to prevent timing side-channels. Refactors CONFIG param
lookup into a single canonical helper.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
